# Curriculum Design: Progressive Exploration v94

## Stages
### Stage 1: Garden
- Difficulty: 0.20
- Focus: optimization
- Success threshold: 0.83
### Stage 2: Dry-dock
- Difficulty: 0.38
- Focus: negotiation
- Success threshold: 0.61
### Stage 3: Archives
- Difficulty: 0.42
- Focus: analysis
- Success threshold: 0.80
### Stage 4: Tide-pool
- Difficulty: 0.29
- Focus: negotiation
- Success threshold: 0.60
### Stage 5: Dry-dock
- Difficulty: 0.19
- Focus: crafting
- Success threshold: 0.69
### Stage 6: Dry-dock
- Difficulty: 0.16
- Focus: navigation
- Success threshold: 0.64
### Stage 7: Forge
- Difficulty: 0.13
- Focus: negotiation
- Success threshold: 0.79
### Stage 8: Tide-pool
- Difficulty: 0.44
- Focus: negotiation
- Success threshold: 0.82

## Advancement Rule
Progress when success rate > threshold for 5 consecutive episodes.
